channel.title: A Hugo website
channel.description: Recent content on A Hugo website

item.title: Test Blog post of my own
item.description: Zombie Ipsum Zombie ipsum reversus ab viral inferno, nam rick grimes malum cerebro. De carne lumbering animata corpora quaeritis. Summus brains sit , morbo vel maleficia? De apocalypsi gorger omero undead survivor dictum mauris. Hi mindless mortuis soulless creaturas, imo evil stalking monstra adventus resi dentevil vultus comedat cerebella viventium. Qui animated corpse, cricket bat max brucks terribilem incessu zomby. The voodoo sacerdos flesh eater, suscitat mortuos comedere carnem virus.

item.title: About
item.description: I need to change this About. It is based on using the blogdown package. The theme was forked from @jrutheiser/hugo-lithium-theme and modified by Yihui Xie.

item.title: Curriculum Vitae
item.description: Katharine MN Lee University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign 109 Davenport Hall, 607 S Mathews Ave, Urbana, IL 61801 kmLee6@illinois.edu Education 2013-present University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign (UIUC). Urbana, IL PhD Candidate - Biological Anthropology Department of Anthropology 2007 Texas A&M-Texarkana. Texarkana, TX Master of Science in Business Administration Army Materiel Command Fellows Program 2006 Tulane University. New Orleans, LA Bachelor of Science in Engineering, field of Biomedical Engineering
